chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1528 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 25-09-2025 Mr. Muhammad Naseer Chachar, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioners, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition and submits that he will file a fresh petition after curing the defects, which is not opposed by learned AAG. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
